parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT ON (ce.contact_id)
  ce.contact_id AS "contactId",
  ce.conversation_id AS "conversationId",
  COALESCE(ce.nombre, 'Sin nombre') AS name,
  COALESCE(ce.phone, '') AS phone,
  hm.text AS "matchedMessage",
  hm.created_at AS "matchedAt",
  COALESCE(ce.modo_atencion, 'bot') AS status,
  COALESCE(ce.bot_activo, TRUE) AS "botActive",
  COALESCE(ce.human_override, FALSE) AS "humanOverride",
  ce.last_message_ts AS "lastMessageTs",
  ce.updated_at AS "updatedAt",
  COALESCE(ce.unread_count, 0)::int AS "unreadCount"
FROM historial_mensajes hm
JOIN conversaciones_estado ce ON ce.contact_id = hm.contact_id
WHERE hm.text ILIKE '%{{ $json.q }}%'
ORDER BY ce.contact_id, hm.id DESC
LIMIT 30;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ names: [{ givenName: $json.nombre }], phoneNumbers: [{ value: $json.telefono, type: 'mobile' }], memberships: [{ contactGroupMembership: { contactGroupResourceName: $json.grupoResourceName } }] }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO contactos_crm
  (contact_id, nombre, telefono, google_resource_name, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES
  ('{{ $('Consolidar Grupo').first().json.sql.contactId }}', '{{ $('Consolidar Grupo').first().json.sql.nombre }}', '{{ $('Consolidar Grupo').first().json.sql.telefono }}', '{{ $json.resourceName }}', NOW(), NOW())
ON CONFLICT (contact_id) DO UPDATE SET
  nombre = EXCLUDED.nombre,
  telefono = EXCLUDED.telefono,
  google_resource_name = EXCLUDED.google_resource_name,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING *;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contactId: $('Consolidar Grupo').first().json.contactId, googleResourceName: $('DB - Guardar Contacto').first().json.google_resource_name } }}
={{ { ok: false, error: 'nombre, telefono y contactId son requeridos' } }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO contactos_crm
  (contact_id, nombre, telefono, google_resource_name, google_etag, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.resourceName }}',
  '{{ String($json.nombre || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.telefono || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.resourceName }}',
  '{{ String($json.etag || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (google_resource_name) DO UPDATE SET
  nombre = EXCLUDED.nombre,
  telefono = EXCLUDED.telefono,
  google_etag = EXCLUDED.google_etag,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE contactos_crm.google_etag IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.google_etag
RETURNING contact_id, nombre, telefono;

SELECT contact_id, nombre, telefono, google_resource_name, google_etag
FROM contactos_crm
WHERE contact_id = '{{ $json.sql.contactId }}'
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ etag: $json.etag, names: [{ givenName: $json.nombreFinal }], phoneNumbers: [{ value: $json.telefonoFinal, type: 'mobile' }] }) }}

parameters.query:
UPDATE contactos_crm SET
  nombre = '{{ $('Preparar Actualizacion').first().json.nombreFinal.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  telefono = '{{ $('Preparar Actualizacion').first().json.telefonoFinal.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  google_etag = '{{ String($json.etag || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE contact_id = '{{ $('Preparar Actualizacion').first().json.sql.contactId }}'
RETURNING *;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, error: 'Contacto no encontrado en CRM' } }}
={{ { ok: false, error: 'contactId y al menos nombre o telefono son requeridos' } }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO historial_mensajes
  (contact_id, role, text, media_url, app_id, sender_type, ghl_message_id, is_read)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Validar Media').first().json.contactId }}',
  'assistant',
  '',
  '{{ $('Validar Media').first().json.mediaUrl }}',
  '6a292eaaab6c8cd2b6a8232a',
  'human',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.messageId || $json.id || "" }}', ''),
  TRUE
)
ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;
SELECT '{{ $json.messageId || $json.id || "" }}' AS message_id;

SELECT
  ce.contact_id AS "contactId",
  ce.conversation_id AS "conversationId",
  COALESCE(ce.nombre, 'Sin nombre') AS name,
  COALESCE(ce.phone, '') AS phone,
  COALESCE(ce.last_message_body, hm.text, '') AS "lastMessage",
  COALESCE(ce.unread_count, 0)::int AS "unreadCount",
  COALESCE(ce.modo_atencion, 'bot') AS status,
  COALESCE(ce.bot_activo, TRUE) AS "botActive",
  COALESCE(ce.human_override, FALSE) AS "humanOverride",
  ce.motivo AS reason,
  ce.last_message_ts AS "lastMessageTs",
  ce.updated_at AS "updatedAt"
FROM conversaciones_estado ce
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT text FROM historial_mensajes h
  WHERE h.contact_id = ce.contact_id
  ORDER BY h.id DESC LIMIT 1
) hm ON TRUE
ORDER BY ce.last_message_ts DESC NULLS LAST, ce.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 100;

parameters.jsCode:
const chats = $input.all().map(item => item.json).filter(item => item && item.contactId);
return [{ json: { ok: true, chats } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT conversation_id AS "conversationId"
FROM conversaciones_estado
WHERE contact_id = '{{ $json.contactId }}'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT
  id::text,
  role,
  text,
  media_url AS "mediaUrl",
  created_at AS "createdAt",
  app_id AS "appId",
  sender_type AS "senderType",
  ghl_message_id AS "ghlMessageId",
  is_read AS "isRead"
FROM historial_mensajes
WHERE contact_id = '{{ $json.contactId }}' AND id > {{ $json.cursor }}
ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 100;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: false, error: "parametros de sincronizacion invalidos" } }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO conversaciones_estado
  (contact_id, bot_activo, modo_atencion, human_override, motivo, updated_at)
VALUES ('{{ $json.sql.contactId }}', FALSE, 'humano', TRUE, 'CRM_HUMANO', NOW())
ON CONFLICT (contact_id) DO UPDATE SET
  bot_activo = FALSE,
  modo_atencion = 'humano',
  human_override = TRUE,
  motivo = 'CRM_HUMANO',
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO chats_pausados (contact_id, reason, paused_at, paused_by, status)
VALUES ('{{ $json.sql.contactId }}', 'INTERVENCION_HUMANA_CRM', NOW(), '{{ $json.sql.userName }}', 'atendiendo')
ON CONFLICT (contact_id) DO UPDATE SET
  reason = EXCLUDED.reason,
  paused_at = NOW(),
  paused_by = EXCLUDED.paused_by,
  status = EXCLUDED.status;

DELETE FROM buffer_mensajes WHERE contact_id = '{{ $json.sql.contactId }}';

SELECT TRUE AS chat_tomado;
